flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Northwestern College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (65.8% → 54.6%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Northwestern College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (82.8% → 73.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northwestern College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northwestern College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0k → 1.2k).
